label: Author role
help: Your role in relation to the original pattern

label: Intent match (1–5)
help: Does the generated ODP model what the original pattern was designed to model? 1 = completely misses the intent, 5 = fully captures it

label: Scope appropriate (1–5)
help: Is the breadth of the generated ODP appropriate? 1 = far too broad or too narrow, 5 = exactly right + specify if broad or narrow

label: Reuse readiness (1–5)
help: How ready is this draft for reuse without major modification? 1 = requires complete rework, 5 = usable as-is

label: Adoption threshold
help: Would you start from this draft rather than from scratch? Choose Yes / Maybe / No and add a brief justification in the next field.

label: Adoption threshold — justification
help: Brief reason for your adoption choice above.
placeholder: e.g. The core classes are correct but the property domains need adjustment.

label: Time saved vs from-scratch
help: If you had to produce a first-draft ODP for this scenario, how much time would this LLM draft save you?

label: Missing core elements
help: List any classes, properties, or axioms that are essential to the pattern but absent from the generated draft, or changes needed before this draft would be usable.
placeholder: e.g. Missing subclass axioms, incorrect property domains, absent restrictions…
